description: Create a SQL VIEW named 'vue_patients_complete' in the 'DrTuxTest' database (MySQL user: root, no password) to simplify patient data access. The view must join the search index table ('IndexNomPrenom') with the demographic table ('fchpat') using a LEFT JOIN on 'IndexNomPrenom.FchGnrl_IDDos = fchpat.FchPat_GUID_Doss', filtering for rows where 'IndexNomPrenom.FchGnrl_Type' is 'Dossier'. The view must include the following column aliases: 'guid' (from IndexNomPrenom.FchGnrl_IDDos), 'nom' (from IndexNomPrenom.FchGnrl_NomDos), 'prenom' (from IndexNomPrenom.FchGnrl_Prenom), 'date_naissance' (from fchpat.FchPat_Nee), 'sexe' (from fchpat.FchPat_Sexe), 'adresse' (from fchpat.FchPat_Adresse), 'code_postal' (from fchpat.FchPat_CP), 'ville' (from fchpat.FchPat_Ville), 'telephone' (from fchpat.FchPat_Tel1), 'num_securite_sociale' (from fchpat.FchPat_NumSS), and 'age_annees' (calculated as TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, fchpat.FchPat_Nee, CURDATE())).
